projects.title: HSE PCL Internship
projects.description: Completed a hands-on internship with PCL Construction's Health, Safety & Environment division, supporting site safety officers across active construction projects. Gained direct exposure to hazard identification, incident reporting, and regulatory compliance in a fast-paced industrial environment.
highlights: Conducted daily site inspections and documented findings using HSE reporting tools
Assisted in developing Job Hazard Analysis (JHA) reports for high-risk tasks
Participated in weekly safety meetings and toolbox talks with field crews
Supported incident investigation procedures and corrective action tracking

projects.title: Academic Project
projects.description: Developed a comprehensive workplace safety program proposal as part of an upper-division occupational health course. The project involved researching existing safety frameworks, identifying gaps in a simulated manufacturing environment, and presenting a full compliance roadmap to faculty and peers.
highlights: Researched and applied OSHA 29 CFR 1910 General Industry standards
Created a written Emergency Action Plan (EAP) and evacuation procedures
Designed training materials covering lockout/tagout and PPE requirements
Presented findings to a panel of faculty and received commendation for thoroughness

projects.title: Industrial Hygiene
projects.description: Led an industrial hygiene assessment project focused on evaluating airborne contaminant exposure levels in a simulated manufacturing facility. Applied principles of anticipation, recognition, evaluation, and control (AREC) to identify health hazards and recommend engineering and administrative controls.
highlights: Performed noise level monitoring and compared results against NIOSH/OSHA PELs
Assessed ventilation adequacy and identified areas of potential chemical overexposure
Recommended hierarchy-of-controls solutions including substitution and local exhaust ventilation
Compiled a formal hygiene report with quantitative exposure data and remediation timelines

projects.title: Safety for the Best
projects.description: Coordinated a community-focused safety awareness initiative aimed at promoting workplace safety literacy among young workers and underserved communities. The program included hands-on training sessions, informational resources, and partnerships with local organizations to extend reach and impact.
highlights: Organized and facilitated four safety awareness workshops for 60+ participants
Developed accessible training materials covering basic hazard recognition and rights
Partnered with two local nonprofits to distribute PPE and safety guides
Received positive feedback with 95% of participants rating sessions as highly valuable
